articles.author: Hannah Pedone
articles.title: Nebius’s stock falls as investors get a wake-up call on the cost of competing in AI - MarketWatch
articles.description: The neocloud company has new deals with major tech companies, and just announced that it will be taking on debt to help finance data centers
articles.content:
Shares of Nebius Group slid on Tuesday as investors got a reality check on the costs of the companys AI-infrastructure buildout.
The stock fell 10.4% on Tuesday after the neocloud company announced … [+167 chars]

articles.title: Nvidia’s AI-Powered Photorealistic Gaming Technology Roasted As ‘AI Slop’ - Forbes
articles.description: Nvidia promised its new technology is a “dramatic leap in visual realism,” though gamers voiced fears it will diminish the artistic appearance of video games.
articles.content: Nvidia unveiled the newest version of its DLSS video game graphics technology, which is meant to make games look especially realisticbut it is getting roasted by gamers and content creators across so… [+4625 chars]
